ticket.title: OrangeHRM Navigation Test
ticket.description: Verify that a user can log in to OrangeHRM and navigate to each main module via the sidebar menu, confirming each page loads with the correct URL pattern and heading.
acceptance_criteria: User can navigate to login page
User can login with valid credentials
User can navigate to Admin module via sidebar
User can navigate to PIM module via sidebar
User can navigate to Leave module via sidebar
User can navigate to Time module via sidebar
User can navigate to Recruitment module via sidebar
User can navigate to My Info module via sidebar
User can navigate to Performance module via sidebar
User can navigate to Dashboard module via sidebar
User can navigate to Directory module via sidebar
Each module page loads with correct URL and heading
